summary: Issue #472 wires live Fujiwa analytics backfill CLI with credential resolve, OAuth refresh, ProductionReadClientFactory Section-A resources, partition dispatcher, budgeted orchestrator integration, --dry-run, and exit-code semantics. Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass. Security: summary_to_text and structured logs exclude tokens; tests assert no token leakage. Reliability: partition failures rollback session; budget pause commits prior progress with exit 0. All code-spec acceptance criteria mapped to unit tests; issue operator HITL ACs deferred post-merge per locked decision #8.

interfaceChanges.description: Live operator wiring for budgeted analytics backfill via ProductionReadClientFactory.
CLI now runs live backfill path with --dry-run instead of validate-only stub.

mappings.criterion: Complete run returns exit ready summary via live backfill orchestrator wiring
Parser accepts dry run flag for env credential validation without Partner HTTP
Backfill main returns exit code zero when stopped reason is budget
Dispatcher maps revenue live product catalog buckets to partition functions
Dry run validates without partner calls keeping live Partner out of CI

recommendations: Mid-partition budget pause reports zero completed/skipped in synthetic OrchestratorResult — operator should rely on budget_fields and re-run until complete (documented in MODULE.md).
REDIS_URL optional; omitting increases 429 risk — operator should export REDIS_URL for live HITL runs.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; no CRITICAL reliability, security, observability, or performance gaps for CLI wiring slice.

ownerSignoff.statement: All five code-spec acceptance criteria mapped to unit tests; operator HITL checklist on #462 is post-merge.
